title: SGLang v0.5.9 Engine Configuration
description: Configuration schema for SGLang v0.5.9 engine parameters

load_format.description: The format of the model weights to load

dtype.description: Data type for model weights and activations

kv_cache_dtype.description: Data type for KV cache storage

trust_remote_code.description: Whether to trust remote code from Hugging Face

context_length.description: The model's maximum context length. Defaults to None (will use the value from the model config)

stream_interval.description: The interval (or buffer size) for streaming in terms of the token length

tensor_parallel_size.description: The number of tensor parallel replicas

data_parallel_size.description: The number of data parallel replicas

mem_fraction_static.description: The fraction of the memory used for static allocation (model weights and KV cache memory pool). Use a smaller value if you see out-of-memory errors

max_running_requests.description: The maximum number of running requests

max_total_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens in the memory pool. If not specified, it will be automatically calculated based on the memory usage fraction

chunked_prefill_size.description: The maximum number of tokens in a chunk for chunked prefill. Setting this to -1 means disabling chunked prefill

max_prefill_tokens.description: The maximum number of tokens in a prefill batch

schedule_conservativeness.description: How conservative the schedule policy is. A larger value means more conservative scheduling

grammar_backend.description: Choose the backend for constrained decoding

disable_cuda_graph.description: Disable CUDA graph for model forward. Fall back to eager mode

disable_cuda_graph_padding.description: Disable CUDA graph when padding is detected

enable_torch_compile.description: Optimize the model with torch.compile (experimental, only works for small models)

enable_p2p_check.description: Enable P2P check for GPU access

enable_mla.description: Enable Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) for DeepSeek-V2

log_level.description: The logging level of all loggers

log_level_http.description: The logging level of HTTP server. If not set, reuse log_level

log_requests.description: Log the inputs and outputs of all requests

show_time_cost.description: Show time cost of custom marks in the log

chat_template.description: The bultin chat template name or the path of the chat template file

is_embedding.description: Whether to use a CausalLM as an embedding model

revision.description: The specific model version to use. It can be a branch name, a tag name, or a commit id

decode_log_interval.description: The log interval of decode batch

enable_cache_report.description: Return number of cached tokens in usage.prompt_tokens_details

lora_paths.description: The list of LoRA adapter paths

max_loras_per_batch.description: Maximum number of LoRA adapters in a running batch
